title: Fish Sauce Citrus Cod
description: This quick-fix Spanish dish combines the tangy freshness of fish sauce with the vibrant flavors of citrus to create a silky and citrusy masterpiece that is perfect for low-carb diets.
instructions: Slice the lemons and oranges into thin rounds.
Place the cod fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, skin-side up. Season lightly with salt.
Gently rub each side of the fish with olive oil.
Arrange lemon slices around the fish to infuse its tangy flavor.
Drizzle half of the fish sauce over each piece of fish and top with an orange slice on each.
Bake in preheated oven for about 12-15 minutes or until the cod is cooked through (internal temperature should reach at least 145°F).
Garnish with extra lemon slices and serve immediately.
